changelog: Added the ability to manually edit application names on the list by clicking the current title.
Enabled adding applications to the list by dragging and dropping files or shortcuts directly into the application window.
Cleaned up application titles on the list by removing file extensions for a more polished look.
Improved drag-and-drop behavior; reordering applications is now restricted to the application section boundaries rather than the entire window height.
Fixed an issue where names of manually added applications were not displayed correctly.
Implemented additional preventive measures to further minimize potential issues on non-standard monitor configurations.
Performed a major code refactor to establish a better foundation for future development.
